contract.title: Will Bitcoin be above $109,999.99 by Dec 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET?
contract.resolution_criteria: If the Bitcoin spot price according to the CF Bitcoin Real-Time Index is above $109999.99 starting 01/02/2026 06:00 PM and before Dec 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.

conditions.label: BTC > $109,999.99 on CF RT Index
conditions.summary: YES if, at any moment from Jan 2, 2026 6:00 PM ET (inclusive) to before Dec 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET, the CF Bitcoin Real-Time Index spot price is strictly > $109,999.99 USD.

contract.narrative: Since late 2025, U.S. actions skew bullish: CME/ICE/CFE/Coinbase expand crypto futures, 24/7 market-maker programs and hours; Nasdaq files to list the iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF; CFTC tokenized-collateral pilots and FDIC stablecoin standards add clarity - together lifting odds BTC >$109,999.99 by end-2026. Headwinds: tighter bank capital rules and NY AG suits vs Coinbase/Gemini. Pending: SEC ETF approval and litigation outcomes.

timeline.title: CME | Implementation of the Nasdaq CME Crypto Index Futures Market Maker Program | [2]
timeline.regulator: Commodity Futures Trading Commission — Office of the Secretariat
timeline.one_line_why: Commodity Futures Trading Commission — Office of the Secretariat — Commodity Futures Trading Commission: tangential to resolution, no directional effect.

timeline.title: CME | Implementation of the Bitcoin Volatility Futures Market Maker Program | [2]
timeline.one_line_why: CME’s market‑maker program affects bitcoin derivatives liquidity/volatility but has an indirect and ambiguous effect on the BTC spot reaching $109,999.

timeline.title: CME | Expansion of the Trading and ClearingHours for all Cryptocurrency Futures and Options on Futures Contracts. | [1]
timeline.one_line_why: CME expanding crypto futures trading/clearing hours boosts liquidity and price discovery, modestly increasing odds BTC tops $110k and may resolve sooner.

timeline.title: CME | Implementation of the Cryptocurrency Options 24/7 Weekend Market MakerProgram | [2]
timeline.one_line_why: Bullish: CME's 24/7 weekend market-maker program modestly increases liquidity/trading access, slightly raising odds BTC tops $109,999.99 and may speed timing.

timeline.title: CME | Implementation of the Cryptocurrency Futures 24/7 Weekend Market Maker Program | [2]
timeline.regulator: Commodity Futures Trading Commission — Office of the Secretariat
timeline.one_line_why: CME's 24/7 weekend market-maker program boosts futures liquidity and continuous price discovery, modestly raising odds BTC tops $109,999.99 — bullish.

timeline.title: Self-Regulatory Organizations; The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC; Notice of Filing of Proposed Rule Change, as Modified by Amendment No. 1 Thereto, to List and Trade Shares of iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF under Nasdaq Rule 5711(d) (CommodityBased Trust...
timeline.one_line_why: SEC notice to list BlackRock iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF raises institutional access/demand, modestly increasing odds BTC tops $109,999 in 2026.
timeline.effective_date: The Shares will not trade on the Exchange until such time that the Registration Statement is effective.

timeline.title: Attorney General James Sues Coinbase and Gemini for Running Illegal Gambling Platforms in New York
timeline.regulator: New York Attorney General — Investor Protection Bureau
timeline.one_line_why: NY AG sues Coinbase and Gemini; reduced US exchange access/confidence likely lowers BTC demand, making >$110k less likely (medium).

timeline.title: COIN | Crypto Market Maker Program - 04/16/2026
timeline.one_line_why: CFTC market-maker program for Coinbase derivatives could boost liquidity and institutional demand, slightly increasing odds BTC exceeds $109,999.99.

timeline.title: CME | Modifications to the Event Contract… - 04/16/2026
timeline.one_line_why: CFTC notice of CME contract modifications likely only indirectly affects BTC price/liquidity via futures; no clear directional effect on CF RT Index.

timeline.title: 04/10/26 - GENIUS Act Requirements and Standards for FDIC-Supervised Permitted Payment Stablecoin Issuers (RIN 3064–AG19)
timeline.regulator: Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation — Division of Complex Institution Supervision and Resolution
timeline.one_line_why: Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation — Division of Complex Institution Supervision and Resolution — Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation: tangential to resolution, no directional effect.

timeline.title: Regulatory Capital: Category I and II Banking Organizations, Banking Organizations With Significant Trading Activity, and Optional Adoption for Other Banking Organizations
timeline.regulator: Office of the Comptroller of the Currency
timeline.one_line_why: Capital rule changes tightening banks' trading activity could reduce institutional crypto holdings/trading, lowering odds BTC tops $109,999.99 in 2026.

timeline.title: Regulatory Capital Rule: Category I and II Banking Organizations, Banking Organizations with Significant Trading Activity, and Optional Adoption for Other Banking Organizations
timeline.one_line_why: Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation — Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation: tangential to resolution, no directional effect.

timeline.title: ICE US New Cryptocurrency Futures Liquidity Provider Program
timeline.one_line_why: CFTC-backed ICE liquidity provider program for crypto futures should improve liquidity and demand, modestly increasing odds BTC tops $109,999.99.

timeline.title: ICE US New Cryptocurrency Futures Market Maker Program

timeline.one_line_why: CFTC changes to Coinbase's perp futures market-maker program may only indirectly affect BTC liquidity/volatility, so no clear impact on >$109,999 outcome.

timeline.title: CME - Modifications to the Bitcoin Friday Futures Market Maker Program
timeline.one_line_why: CME changes to Bitcoin futures market‑maker program can affect liquidity/volatility and thus spot dynamics, but the title alone gives no clear directional effect.

timeline.title: Acting Chairman Pham Announces Launch of Digital Assets Pilot Program for Tokenized Collateral in Derivatives Markets
timeline.regulator: Commodity Futures Trading Commission — Market Participants Division, Division of Market Oversight, Division of Clearing and Risk
timeline.one_line_why: CFTC pilot to allow tokenized collateral in derivatives likely boosts institutional demand/liquidity for crypto, modestly increasing odds BTC tops $110k in 2026.

timeline.title: Modifications to Position Limits
timeline.one_line_why: CFTC changes to position limits can affect Bitcoin futures liquidity/volatility and thus spot price, but direction and magnitude are unclear.

primary_drivers: CME rollouts: 24/7 crypto futures/options and multiple market‑maker programs
Nasdaq filings expanding trading hours and market‑maker frameworks
High‑profile enforcement actions (AG suit vs Coinbase & Gemini)
heat_panel.explainer: This week's heat is driven by major market‑structure changes — CME and Nasdaq launching 24/7 crypto derivatives and market‑maker programs — plus a high‑profile AG enforcement suit increasing scrutiny.
